arts.ttl: “No one need think we’re the favorites. We’re not” — Bayern Munich’s Karl-Heinz Rummenigge breaks down Inter Milan clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge spent terrific stints of his career in Bavaria and with Inter Milan, which might leave the player-turned-executive conflicted. We simply have to try to play at the same level as we did in those two games against Leverkusen.
